payload.target_audience: AI search users on ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude
payload.prompt_override: Create a COMPREHENSIVE AEO/GEO strategy for AgenticMarketingPro. Include: 1) Entity authority framework (Wikipedia/Wikidata presence, knowledge graph optimization), 2) LLM citation strategy (how to get cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Copilot), 3) 4 content pillars for AI visibility (definitional, comparative, statistical, tutorial), 4) Perplexity-specific optimization tactics, 5) LLM prompt testing protocol (50 variations/week), 6) AI citation tracking methodology. Context: We need to OWN the 'agentic marketing' category in AI search results.
